title: Return process in case of Trade-in order cancellations
bodyHtml:
Since June 2021, sellers have been in charge of generating return labels for customers in case they refuse your counteroffer. Going forward, you’ll be able to ask for a refund of those return costs directly in the Seller Support Center. The exact conditions to do so are mentioned in this article.
 

How to get a refund of return costs

This process is only valid for refused counteroffers (and can NOT be applied to authentication/non-European issues).

When an order is canceled after a counteroffer, you have to generate a shipping label, send the item back to the customer within 2 business days, and provide them with the tracking number in the after-sales conversation.

You can send the list of orders where you had to generate a shipping label by creating a ticket in the Seller Support Center by following these exact steps:

  1. Go to the Seller Support Center and submit a new request
  2. Select "Is your question order related?" > "Yes" > "Trade-in order"
  3. In the list, select "Request a refund of return costs"
  4. Click "Next"
  5. Provide all order numbers involved in this refund request


The results will be sent directly to the Trade-in Team who will proceed with your request.

Our team from the Seller Support Center will check your requests and confirm that all conditions were respected with the finance team.
 

How much will Back Market refund?

The amount that will be refunded depends on the product category and the country. Take a look at the price grid that was defined by our Trade-in team. 



 

How does Back Market determine these prices?

Example for a smartphone (from seller in France to customer in France):

  • The price is fixed based on the average shipping provider’s price for a 250g package without insurance.
  • You can use the original package provided by the customer. Please make sure to return the package in the correct condition to avoid any problems during transport.

 

How to get the return costs refunded?

  • Send a request to the Seller Support Center within 3 months of the reception date.
  • Send the message within 2 business days of the cancellation date.
  • Provide a photo of the device in the after-sales platform before shipment.
  • Send the tracking number in the after-sales management page (using the word "tracking", “suivi”, “seguimiento”, “rastreo”, "Sendungsverfolgung", "Sendungsverfolg" or "Sendungsnummer" in the template). You can use the templates attached to this article. 

 

When will I receive the refund?

All requests provided within each month will be refunded on the 6th of the next month.

For example, if you send us a request on October 22, we will refund you on the invoicing period of November 6. If you ask for a refund on November 5, we will refund you the month after, on  December 6.

The refunds will be invoiced as "buyback_logistics_refund".

 

What happens if the item is lost during shipping?

If the item sent back is lost or broken during shipping, Back Market will reimburse the customer via a credit request at the original price 72 hours after the issue has been reported by the customer (if proof has been given).
